## What's Changed

> ⚠️ **Breaking change**: SSE transport has been removed. Clients must use `--transport streamable-http`.

### New Features
* Add semantic layer MCP tools (Metastore API — tables, attributes, metrics, filters, datasets) by @Matovidlo and @mariankrotil in https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/416
* Add `folder` parameter to transformations, data apps, and flows by @Matovidlo in https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/438
* Add `configuration_row_ids` support to `run_job` tool by @vita-stejskal in https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/454

### Improvements
* Add `WHEN NOT TO USE` guidance to generic component tool docstrings by @tomasfejfar in https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/459
* Clarify `parameter_updates` path is relative to `parameters` by @AdamVyborny in https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/469

### Breaking Changes
* Remove SSE transport — streamable-HTTP only by @Matovidlo in https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/pull/446

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/keboola/mcp-server/compare/v1.49.1...v1.55.0
